title: Implement manual_pr and auto_pr integration flows around durable review artifacts
summary: Teach PRISM to manage review-artifact-centered landing for manual_pr and auto_pr modes so branch-published work can move into integration_pending, integration_in_progress, and integrated_to_target with explicit artifact references and verified target landing, rather than stopping at branch publication.

acceptance.label: manual_pr and auto_pr are live policy modes with durable artifact and integration state transitions.
PRISM can distinguish waiting for human-approved landing from automatically managed PR landing without conflating either one with completion.
